title: Pomapelo's Animated Foliage
description: A simple, vanilla+ texture pack dedicated to animating foliage such as grass, vines, and lilypads, along with their variations.
body:
A simple, vanilla+ texture pack dedicated to animating foliage such as grass, vines, and lilypads, along with their variations.

_Video taken with Complementary Reimagined Shaders and Iris._

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/9uthTFIU2eM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

List of altered textures:

General

- Grass
- Tall Grass
- Bush
  
Desert

- Short Dry Grass
- Tall Dry Grass
- Dead Bush
  
Lush Caves
  
- Lush Vines + Variations
  
Tundra

- Fern
- Large Fern
  
Swamp
  
- Vines
- Lilypads
  
Crimson Forest
  
- Crimson Roots
- Weeping Vines
 
Warped Forest
  
- Warped Roots
- Twisting Vines
